note: MetaMorpho ERC-4626 vault cover-batch on chain 1 (top-8 by TVL, mixed v1.0/v1.1; full universe=_address_universe.json). EVERY snapshot external-mutating selector triaged (I1). cover=ERC-4626 deposit/withdraw/mint/redeem (concrete $to-keyed MetaMorpho manifests, venue=metamorpho); exclude=standard ERC-20/2612 (tokens:erc20 adapter) + curator/owner/allocator governance. mint/redeem share-denominated (§4d enrichment deferred).

0x6fda3868.name: acceptCap((address,address,address,address,uint256))
0x6fda3868.reason: curator/timelock governance (accept a pending market supply cap)

0x095ea7b3.name: approve(address,uint256)
0x095ea7b3.reason: standard ERC-20/ERC-2612 on the vault SHARE token (the vault is itself an ERC-20 yield_receipt registered in token-surface) — approve/permit/transfer/transferFrom analyzed by the tokens:erc20 standard adapter via auto-enumerate, NOT a bespoke MetaMorpho manifest (a cover here would fail I2).

0x6e553f65.name: deposit(uint256,address)
0x6e553f65.reason: user ERC-4626 DEPOSIT into a MetaMorpho vault (asset-denominated) -> LendingAction::Supply, venue=metamorpho{vault=$to}, asset=vault underlying, amount=assets, on_behalf_of=receiver.

0x94bf804d.name: mint(uint256,address)
0x94bf804d.reason: user ERC-4626 MINT vault shares -> LendingAction::Supply, venue=metamorpho{vault=$to}; amount is SHARE-denominated (abstract). Decode-faithful; asset-amount legibility needs convertToAssets enrichment (§4d, deferred).

0xac9650d8.name: multicall(bytes[])
0xac9650d8.reason: batch wrapper for curator/owner governance calls; not a user-position primitive

0xd505accf.name: permit(address,address,uint256,uint256,uint8,bytes32,bytes32)
0xd505accf.reason: standard ERC-20/ERC-2612 on the vault SHARE token (the vault is itself an ERC-20 yield_receipt registered in token-surface) — approve/permit/transfer/transferFrom analyzed by the tokens:erc20 standard adapter via auto-enumerate, NOT a bespoke MetaMorpho manifest (a cover here would fail I2).

0x7299aa31.name: reallocate(((address,address,address,address,uint256),uint256)[])
0x7299aa31.reason: allocator role — rebalance vault liquidity across Morpho Blue markets (curator/allocator, not depositor)

0xba087652.name: redeem(uint256,address,address)
0xba087652.reason: user ERC-4626 REDEEM vault shares -> LendingAction::Withdraw, venue=metamorpho{vault=$to}; amount is SHARE-denominated (abstract). Decode-faithful; legibility needs convertToAssets enrichment (§4d, deferred).

0x3b24c2bf.name: submitCap((address,address,address,address,uint256),uint256)
0x3b24c2bf.reason: curator governance (submit pending market cap, timelocked)

0xa9059cbb.name: transfer(address,uint256)
0xa9059cbb.reason: standard ERC-20/ERC-2612 on the vault SHARE token (the vault is itself an ERC-20 yield_receipt registered in token-surface) — approve/permit/transfer/transferFrom analyzed by the tokens:erc20 standard adapter via auto-enumerate, NOT a bespoke MetaMorpho manifest (a cover here would fail I2).

0x23b872dd.name: transferFrom(address,address,uint256)
0x23b872dd.reason: standard ERC-20/ERC-2612 on the vault SHARE token (the vault is itself an ERC-20 yield_receipt registered in token-surface) — approve/permit/transfer/transferFrom analyzed by the tokens:erc20 standard adapter via auto-enumerate, NOT a bespoke MetaMorpho manifest (a cover here would fail I2).

0xb460af94.name: withdraw(uint256,address,address)
0xb460af94.reason: user ERC-4626 WITHDRAW from a MetaMorpho vault (asset-denominated) -> LendingAction::Withdraw, venue=metamorpho{vault=$to}, asset=vault underlying, amount=assets, recipient=receiver.
